text:
Reserved for hospitals 
participating in ORD demonstration 
projects where TOB = 11X; ESRD clinic 
where TOB = 72X 

0900–0999: Multiple hospital 
component in a medical complex 
(numbers retired) where TOB = 11X; 
ESRD clinic where TOB = 72X 

1000–1199: Federally Qualified Health 
Centers (FQHC) (also CCN range 1800–
1989) 

1200–1224: Alcohol/drug hospitals 
(excluded from PPS-numbers retired) 
where TOB = 11X; ESRD clinic where 
TOB = 72X 

1225–1299: Medical assistance 
facilities (Montana
